name: /standards-audit: report includes action card section recommending next promotions (e.g. "PROMOTE: section X.Y from source Z; would add coverage for...")
setup:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '- id: google-eng-practices
  name: Google
  url: https://g.com
  tier: 1
  applies_to: [typescript]
  fetch_frequency: daily
' > .claude-tdd-pro/STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
